channel.title: Phonetics on Hywel Stoakes
channel.description: Recent content in Phonetics on Hywel Stoakes

item.title: Phonetic Tools
item.description: A great clickable IPA chart on that site that shows MRI, Ultrasound and some animations of the different speech sounds defined by the IPA (IPA Chart
